overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt path through a dark forest at night. The atmospheric scene features moonlit birch trees, stone walls, and dense vegetation as the character explores the natural wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail through birch woodland

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, moving through the dark forest

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with visible tire tracks and patches of grass
white-barked birch trees with dark horizontal markings
white-barked birch trees lining the right side of the path
tall green grass and undergrowth flanking the trail
dense grass and low shrubs on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path surrounded by dense birch forest. The trail is flanked by tall grass and white-barked trees under the dark night sky, creating an enclosed woodland atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with stone wall boundary and landmark tree

events.description: low stone wall becomes visible on the left side of the path
large gnarled tree trunk comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as it curves past a stone wall and approaches a large tree

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the left side of the path
massive twisted tree trunk with dark bark and sprawling branches

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the forest with a stone wall now visible on the left. As the trail curves, a massive gnarled tree emerges on the right, dominating the foreground as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with distant hills visible

events.description: forest canopy opens up to reveal distant forested hills on the horizon

agents.ego_description: walking past the large tree as the landscape opens up to reveal distant terrain and clearer views

entered.detail: distant tree-covered hills silhouetted against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the large gnarled tree as the forest opens up to reveal distant hills on the horizon. The stone wall falls behind as the trail continues through more open woodland with expansive views of the surrounding landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, enclosed birch forest that gradually opens into an expansive nocturnal landscape. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path flanked by tall grass and white-barked trees under a dark night sky. As the trail curves, the environment shifts to include a stone wall on the left and a massive, gnarled tree that emerges to dominate the foreground. The scene then expands as the camera passes the ancient tree, leaving the stone wall behind and moving into more open woodland. Finally, the forest canopy thins to reveal distant hills on the horizon, transforming the claustrophobic woodland into a wide view of the surrounding wilderness.
